area: Task-ledger governance validator fixtures / Broker base state
finding: `validate:task-ledger-governance` fixtures assumed an unborn Git branch or reused one fixed framework fixture directory; after Broker claim admission began requiring a resolvable HEAD, duplicate seed commits and shared queue state caused `ATM_BROKER_TRANSACTION_BASE_MISSING`, `ATM_BROKER_SHARED_QUEUE_BLOCKED`, and empty-commit failures before the intended assertions ran.
expectedBehavior: Every governance fixture should create an isolated repository with one deterministic seed commit and no inherited Broker queue/claim state; fixture setup must be idempotent and fail only on the behavior under test.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0199: isolated fixture helpers clear Broker state and seed one HEAD; regression `tests/cli/task-ledger-fixture-isolation.test.ts`.
followUp: Keep fixture isolation independent of the long integration suite.
